title: Raid on the Imperial Archive

{{Quote|That's where we've traced the artifact isn't it? By all indications it's in the Emperor's Imperial Archive. The Empire is sure to be caught off guard by such a bold raid on the Imperial Archive itself. That passkey is as good as ours.|[[Tyber Zann]]|<ref name="FoC" />}}
The '''Raid on the Imperial Archive''' was a heist led by [[Tyber Zann]] to steal the access codes for the [[Eclipse (Eclipse-class)|''Eclipse'']] at the [[Imperial Archives (museum)/Legends|Imperial Archives]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], [[Capital/Legends|capital]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].

==Prelude==
{{Quote|Thanks to spies I have planted in the Rebellion, we know that both the Emperor and Vader are in the Endor system. That means Coruscant is wide open.|Tyber Zann|<ref name="FoC" />}}
The theft's main objective was to steal the access codes for the ''Eclipse'' and escape in a stolen [[HAVt B5 Juggernaut|Juggernaut]]. It would take Zann and two of his cohorts to deactivate the security systems to open several [[Blast door/Legends|blast doors]] leading directly to the safe. Tyber Zann would destroy the controls for the first two blast doors so he could advance. [[Urai Fen]] would then destroy security nodes to open two more blast doors and deactivate any remaining security systems. Meanwhile, [[Silri]] would wait in the Juggernaut to drive them away past a series of rocket based turrets.

==The theft==
{{Quote|It has been a long time since I had a challenging opponent. Do not disappoint me.|[[Urai Fen]] to one of Palpatine's [[Force Adept]]s|<ref name="FoC" />}}
The plan was sprung into action. Zann went in by bribing an [[Imperial officer/Legends|Imperial officer]] who he later killed. He then took no time to bribe some of the stormtroopers in order to open a blast door near him and kill their fellow troopers. He then met three Imperial [[Force Adept]]s. However, he was able to quickly incapacitate all of them. He moved on to destroy several door controls allowing him and Urai to move on. Silri, who was becoming impatient, sensed the [[Sith holocron/Legends|Sith holocron]] [[Bossk/Legends|Bossk]] had stolen from them. She was attacked by a Force Adept, who she killed. Silri went on the move, summoning her [[Rancor/Legends|rancor]], [[Cuddles]], and followed her senses. She went on to destroy several turrets and many [[Emperor's Royal Guard/Legends|Emperor's royal guards]]. She grabbed the Sith holocron, and moved back to the Juggernaut only to be attacked by a handful of [[Dark Trooper/Legends|dark troopers]], who she believed were deactivated. Meanwhile, Urai activated all doors. He killed several Force Adepts and destroyed the remaining nodes and ran back to Tyber Zann. Elsewhere, Silri's rancor made short work of all the dark troopers and along with Zann and Fen, the Nightsister fled.

Outside, Zann called three [[Mobile Defense Unit|MDUs]] to support his attacks. There he was attacked by many more Phase III dark troopers, which he was able to defeat with the MDU's sensor scramblers and rocket pods. The trio went into the vault, stole the codes and then arrived through another blast door to encounter a Master Force Adept. An MDU arrived and constructed a [[Ysalamiri/Legends|ysalamiri]] [[Ysalamiri cage|cage]] to disable the Adept's power to teleport and then kill him.

Running back to the Juggernaut, they used its point laser defense system to breach through the doors and make their escape.

==Aftermath==
{{Quote|With the Emperor dead, the Empire will be in chaos. Most of the ships from the Kuat blockade will have returned from the battle over Endor to regroup. The time to strike is now! We must take control of the Eclipse.|Tyber Zann|<ref name="FoC" />}}
The passcodes left the ''Eclipse'' open to [[Battle for the Eclipse|attack]], and the Holocron would later prove to lead to a [[Carbonite Sith Army|hidden Sith army]] of [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] [[Trooper/Legends|troopers]].

==Behind the scenes==
The Stormtroopers in the Zann section of the level infinitely respawn, preventing the player from being softlocked in the level from being unable to open the initial door.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption]]''
